title: Living in Boulder vlog 8  - 30  - 2017: Rode 7:30 hrs. Strava screen captures.

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual life update from Boulder, describing his erratic sleep schedule (sleeping 12 hours a day), poor appetite (eating little beyond Taco Bell and bananas), and heavy fruit juice consumption while stationary cycling. He mentions working through the night on Strava screen capture videos and listening to audiobooks about the Punic Wars while riding.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Plans to post a video every day going forward
Prefers pomegranate/cranberry/apple juices over orange juice now; drinks it all day while riding
Frustrated by inability to queue songs; uses YouTube video downloads as workaround
Finds listening to book readings the best way to stay in a groove during long stationary rides

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He didn't do a VLOG for a few days because he was too busy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is starting to do a VLOG every day because he works until he crashes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The other day, he worked until 2 in the morning but ended up working until 6.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He crashed and didn't nap until 5, sleeping for about five hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He got up and rode his bike until 3 in the morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He ended up sleeping for 12 hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is in a stage where he needs 12 hours of sleep a day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His appetite hasn't kicked in; yesterday, he only remembers eating a Taco Bell meal and a couple of bananas.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is still eating like a bird but drinking a lot of fruit juice all day long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He fills his cup with ice all the way to the top and then pours sugar-free fruit juice in.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He drinks pomegranate, cranberry apple, and other fruit juices, having moved on from orange juice.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He loves the sweet, cold drink with a straw while riding his bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to do a demonstration of his bike table when he sobers up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks he'll start selling his bike table.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He places his drink on the table next to his bike while working.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He finds it best to get into a rhythm by listening to music, but he doesn't know how to make a program play one song after another.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plays music off videos he downloads from YouTube on his iPad.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He downloads videos on his phone to listen to music but has to bring up another video to continue listening.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: To stay in the groove, he reads books on his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, he read through a whole chapter of 'Cities, Through the Bell, Tunisian Wars' for about an hour.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has thousands of pages of books to read but can only highlight for about an hour before the computer gets corrupted.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He listens to videos while writing and watching them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has to force-feed himself because his appetite hasn't kicked in.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to get into a daytime schedule so he can ride outside.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wonders if he can time a ride outside during a full moon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hasn't cleaned his bathroom for over a week, and it smells really nasty.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hasn't had time to clean because he sleeps all the time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is making good progress on his 'struggle stuff' and might finish today or tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He will move on to other projects like Google Earth and will have thousands of videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks it will be really cool but doesn't know how long it will take.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to try to do a video every day from now on.

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder, V-Log. It is 5.35 on Thursday, August 31st, so this will be,
I guess, for the 30th. So yeah, I didn't do a V-Log for a few days because I was just
Too busy, you know, on my new thing. Whenever I'm starting on something new, it's hard to
Do V-Log every day because I work until I crash. So the other day, the day before yesterday,
I was writing until 2 in the morning, but then I had to get up at 6.
I had to do some stuff, and then I came back and I crashed. I had a nap until like 5,
So for like 5 hours or something. I was sleeping, and then I got up and I was riding my bike again
Until 3 this morning, and then I didn't get up until 3, so I got 12 hours of sleep. So yeah,
I mean, I'm in the stages where I need 12 hours of sleep a day, but my appetite hasn't really
Kicked in. Like yesterday, the only thing I remember eating was I went to Taco Bell for
Taco Bell meal, and that's the only thing I remember eating. I think I had like a couple
Of bananas, you know, so I'm still eating like a bird, but I'm drinking a lot of fruit juice
All day long. I don't know, I put ice. I fill up my big tall glass full of ice all the way
To the top, and then I pour the fruit juice in. I get the sugar-free fruit juices, and I
Have, I like pomegranate, cranberry, apple, you know, the mixture of fruits. And before I was
Doing just orange juice, but I'm kind of done with orange juice now, like all the other
Ones, because I just love the sweet and cold. Stuck it with a straw while I'm riding. I'll
Do a demonstration. When I sober up, I'll do a demonstration on my bike table. I think
I'll start selling it too. But yeah, so I just put it there on the table next to my bike,
You know, and I'm just sitting on it. It's really cool. And on the computer, I was kind
Of, once I get into my rhythm, I find the best thing for me to help me get into a rhythm
And that's going to last and doesn't make me have to do maintenance, you know. It's
Because I'm not, I'm not very, a lot of ways I'm not sophisticated with a computer. Like
I don't have a program. I don't even know how to make it play one song and then the next
Song on iPad, iTunes. I don't have any other programs. So whenever I play music, I just
Play it off videos that I download on YouTube, you know. So whenever the video's over, if I
Want to keep listening to music, I have to bring up another video. So I don't like to do
That kind of stuff. So what I do to keep me in, get me in the groove and just go forever
All day long is I just go to a book on my page on my website. Yesterday I was doing Thucydides,
History of the Peloponnesian Wars, and I just, I outline, you know, like a whole chapter,
You know, like maybe an hour's worth of reading. And, you know, and I have a whole entire thousands
And thousands of page books on my computer. So theoretically I could just sit there and
Have it read to me all day long, but then the computer gets corrupted and it starts garbling
After like an hour. So about an hour is about as much as you want to highlight anyway. But
Yeah, you just have it read to you and I just listen to it and I'm here writing, watching
The thing as I'm recording. But so, uh, so yeah, um, you know, my, my appetite hasn't really
Kicked in, but I, so I have to kind of force feed myself. And so I've been going to Taco
Bell today. I went there and it took forever. I just want to get everything on the menu, but
It's, you know, it's tasty, but, um, maybe I'll go to Subway. Last time I went there,
They made my sandwich really small. Anyway. Um, so yeah, I'll just ride, I guess until
Three, I would like, I want to eventually try to get into a daytime schedule so that if
I want to, I can do a ride outside, you know, I don't have to wait till like the full moon
To do a nighttime ride if I want to ride outside. Um, but you know, I want to do a few days where
I'm riding, you know, like I haven't even cleaned my bathroom. My bathroom smells like really
Nasty. I haven't cleaned it for like a week or something or more because I haven't had
Time to do that. Cause I've just been like, when you sleep in all the time, you don't
Have time for anything, you know? So, um, but, um, yeah, I'm getting, making pretty good
Progress, um, on my Strava stuff, you know, like I'll be done maybe today, like tomorrow
From Strava screen captures. And then I'll just go onto the other stuff, other Google Earth
And I'll have like thousands of videos. It's going to be really cool. I don't know how long
That's going to take though. I think I've talked long enough though. I'll try to do a video
Every day from now on. Later.
